likewise.en: He works hard, and you should do likewise.
likewise.zh: 他很努力，你也應該如此。

loop.en: She tied the rope in a loop.

lounge.en: We waited in the airport lounge.
lounge.zh: 我們在機場休息室等候。

lump.en: There was a lump of clay on the table.

mainstream.en: The song entered the mainstream of pop music.
mainstream.zh: 這首歌進入了流行音樂的主流。

maintenance.zh: 這台機器需要定期保養。

mammal.en: A whale is a mammal, not a fish.
mammal.zh: 鯨魚是哺乳動物，不是魚。

mandate.en: The new leader has a strong mandate.
mandate.zh: 新領袖獲得了強而有力的授權。

manifest.en: Her joy was manifest on her face.

manipulate.en: He tried to manipulate his friends.

mansion.en: The rich family lives in a huge mansion.
mansion.zh: 這個富裕的家庭住在一棟巨大的豪宅裡。

marine.en: We learned about marine life in the sea.

masculine.en: The deep voice sounded very masculine.
masculine.zh: 那低沉的嗓音聽起來很有男子氣概。

massage.en: A back massage helped him relax.

massive.en: A massive crowd filled the square.

masterpiece.en: The painting is a true masterpiece.

mattress.en: The new mattress is soft and comfortable.
mattress.zh: 這張新床墊又軟又舒服。

meantime.en: In the meantime, let's clean the room.
meantime.zh: 在此同時，我們來打掃房間吧。

mechanism.en: The clock has a complex mechanism.
mechanism.zh: 這個時鐘有複雜的機械結構。

mentor.en: Her teacher was a kind mentor.
mentor.zh: 她的老師是位親切的良師。

merge.en: The two companies merged into one.
merge.zh: 這兩家公司合併成一家。

metaphor.en: 'Time is money' is a common metaphor.
metaphor.zh: 「時間就是金錢」是個常見的比喻。

metropolitan.en: Tokyo is a busy metropolitan city.
metropolitan.zh: 東京是個繁忙的大都會。

midst.en: She stayed calm in the midst of the chaos.
midst.zh: 在混亂之中她保持冷靜。

migration.zh: 鳥類的遷徙每年秋天發生。

milestone.en: Her first book was a major milestone.
milestone.zh: 她的第一本書是個重要的里程碑。

minimal.en: The damage from the storm was minimal.
minimal.zh: 暴風雨造成的損害極小。

minimize.zh: 我們應該把食物浪費降到最低。

mint.en: She added fresh mint to the drink.
mint.zh: 她在飲料裡加了新鮮薄荷。

missionary.en: The missionary helped build a school.
missionary.zh: 這位傳教士幫忙建了一所學校。

moan.en: He let out a moan of pain.
moan.zh: 他發出一聲痛苦的呻吟。

mock.en: It is unkind to mock others.

mode.en: The phone is in silent mode.

modify.en: She modified the recipe to make it healthier.
modify.zh: 她修改了食譜讓它更健康。

molecule.en: A water molecule is very small.

monopoly.en: One company had a monopoly on the market.
monopoly.zh: 一家公司壟斷了這個市場。

morality.en: The story teaches a lesson about morality.
morality.zh: 這個故事教導了一個關於道德的道理。

mortality.en: Good medicine lowers the mortality rate.
mortality.zh: 良好的醫療降低了死亡率。

mortgage.en: They pay a mortgage on their house.

motive.en: The police looked for a motive for the crime.

mount.en: He mounted the picture on the wall.

mumble.en: He mumbled an answer too quietly.
mumble.zh: 他含糊地嘟囔了一個太小聲的回答。

municipal.en: The municipal library is free to use.
municipal.zh: 市立圖書館可以免費使用。

muscular.en: The athlete has a muscular body.
muscular.zh: 這位運動員有結實的肌肉。

mustard.en: He put mustard on his hot dog.

myth.en: The book tells an ancient Greek myth.
myth.zh: 這本書講述一個古希臘神話。

naive.en: It was naive of him to trust a stranger.
naive.zh: 他相信陌生人真是天真。

narrative.en: The film has a clear narrative.
narrative.zh: 這部電影有清楚的故事敘述。

nasty.en: He made a nasty comment about her.
nasty.zh: 他對她說了一句很難聽的話。

negotiation.zh: 經過長時間的協商，他們達成了協議。

neutral.en: The reporter stayed neutral in the debate.
neutral.zh: 記者在辯論中保持中立。

nominate.en: They nominated her for class leader.

nomination.zh: 她被提名沒讓任何人意外。

nominee.en: The nominee gave a short speech.
nominee.zh: 被提名人發表了簡短的演說。

nonprofit.en: She volunteers at a nonprofit group.
nonprofit.zh: 她在一個非營利團體當志工。

norm.en: Working from home has become the norm.

noticeable.en: There was a noticeable change in his grades.
noticeable.zh: 他的成績有明顯的變化。

notify.en: Please notify us if you can't come.
notify.zh: 如果你不能來請通知我們。

notion.en: She had no notion of how hard it would be.
notion.zh: 她完全沒料到這會有多難。

nowhere.en: The lost dog was nowhere to be found.
nowhere.zh: 走失的狗到處都找不到。

nutrient.zh: 水果含有許多有用的營養素。

nutrition.en: Good nutrition is important for growth.
nutrition.zh: 良好的營養對成長很重要。

obligation.en: We have an obligation to help others.
obligation.zh: 我們有幫助別人的義務。

obscure.en: The meaning of the poem is obscure.
obscure.zh: 這首詩的意思晦澀難懂。

observer.en: A careful observer notices small details.
observer.zh: 細心的觀察者會注意到小細節。

odds.en: The odds of winning are very low.

offering.en: They placed an offering at the temple.

olive.en: She added olives to the salad.

operational.en: The new system is now operational.
operational.zh: 新系統現在可以運作了。

opponent.en: He shook hands with his opponent.

opposition.zh: 這個計畫遭到強烈反對。

opt.en: She opted to take the train instead.

optimism.en: His optimism kept the team going.
optimism.zh: 他的樂觀讓團隊堅持下去。

optional.en: The dessert is optional, not required.
optional.zh: 甜點是可選的，不是必須的。

orchard.en: They picked apples in the orchard.

originality.zh: 她的藝術展現了極高的原創性。

outfit.en: She wore a stylish outfit to the party.
outfit.zh: 她穿著時髦的服裝去派對。

outlet.en: Sports are a healthy outlet for stress.
outlet.zh: 運動是紓解壓力的健康出口。

outsider.en: At first, she felt like an outsider.
outsider.zh: 起初她覺得自己像個局外人。

overtake.en: The fast car overtook the truck.

overturn.en: The strong wind overturned the boat.

overwhelm.en: The work began to overwhelm her.
overwhelm.zh: 工作開始讓她應接不暇。

parallel.en: The two roads run parallel to each other.

participant.zh: 每位參加者都拿到一個號碼。

particle.en: Tiny particles of dust filled the air.
particle.zh: 微小的灰塵顆粒充滿空氣。

partly.en: The accident was partly my fault.
partly.zh: 這場意外有部分是我的錯。

passionate.en: She is passionate about saving animals.

pastry.zh: 這家麵包店賣新鮮的糕點。

patch.en: She sewed a patch over the hole.
patch.zh: 她在洞上縫了一塊補丁。

patent.en: He got a patent for his invention.
patent.zh: 他為他的發明取得了專利。

pathetic.zh: 他那薄弱的藉口很可悲。

patrol.en: Guards patrol the area at night.
patrol.zh: 警衛在夜裡巡邏這個區域。

patron.en: A wealthy patron supported the artist.
patron.zh: 一位富有的贊助人支持這位藝術家。

peasant.en: The peasant worked hard in the fields.

pedal.en: He pushed the pedal to speed up.

penetrate.en: Sunlight could not penetrate the thick fog.

pension.en: He lives on his pension after retiring.
pension.zh: 退休後他靠退休金生活。

perceive.en: We perceive colors with our eyes.

perception.en: Her perception of the problem changed.
perception.zh: 她對這個問題的看法改變了。

performer.en: The performer bowed after the show.

persist.en: She persisted until she solved it.
persist.zh: 她堅持到把它解決為止。

personnel.zh: 這間辦公室雇用了更多人員。

perspective.en: Try to see it from my perspective.

pessimism.en: His pessimism made the team gloomy.
pessimism.zh: 他的悲觀讓團隊士氣低落。

petition.en: They signed a petition to save the park.
petition.zh: 他們簽了一份拯救公園的請願書。

phase.en: We are in the first phase of the project.
phase.zh: 我們正處於專案的第一階段。

photographic.zh: 她有過目不忘的記憶力。

pickup.en: Arrange a pickup time for the package.
pickup.zh: 為這個包裹安排取件時間。

pier.en: We walked to the end of the pier.

pillar.en: Tall pillars supported the temple roof.
pillar.zh: 高大的柱子撐起了廟的屋頂。

pipeline.en: Oil flows through a long pipeline.
pipeline.zh: 石油從一條長管線流過。

pirate.en: The story is about a brave pirate.
pirate.zh: 這個故事是關於一個勇敢的海盜。

pitcher.en: The pitcher threw a fast ball.

placement.en: The placement of the chairs was neat.

plea.en: She made a plea for help.

plead.en: The child pleaded for one more story.
plead.zh: 孩子央求再聽一個故事。

pledge.en: They made a pledge to protect the forest.

plunge.en: The diver plunged into the deep water.

poetic.en: She wrote a poetic description of the sea.
poetic.zh: 她寫了一段詩意的海洋描寫。

poke.en: He poked the fire with a stick.

porch.en: We sat on the porch in the evening.

portfolio.zh: 這位藝術家展示了她的作品集。

practitioner.zh: 她是個執業的醫療人員。

precaution.en: Take precautions to avoid the flu.
precaution.zh: 採取預防措施避免流感。

predator.en: The lion is a powerful predator.

preference.en: My preference is for tea, not coffee.

prejudice.en: We should judge people without prejudice.
prejudice.zh: 我們應該不帶偏見地評斷別人。

premature.en: It is premature to celebrate now.

premier.en: It is the premier hotel in the city.
premier.zh: 這是城裡最頂級的飯店。

premise.en: His argument is based on a false premise.
premise.zh: 他的論點建立在錯誤的前提上。

premium.zh: 我們買了優質的咖啡豆。

prescription.en: Take this prescription to the pharmacy.

presidency.zh: 他的總統任期持續了四年。

presidential.en: The presidential election is next year.

presumably.en: He's late, so presumably he missed the bus.
presumably.zh: 他遲到了，想必是錯過了公車。

presume.en: I presume you have read the rules.
presume.zh: 我猜你已經讀過規則了。

prevail.en: In the end, justice will prevail.

prey.en: The eagle dived toward its prey.

prior.en: You need prior experience for this job.
prior.zh: 這份工作需要相關的經驗。

proclaim.en: The king proclaimed a national holiday.
proclaim.zh: 國王宣布了一個全國假日。

productivity.zh: 良好的睡眠能提升生產力。

profile.zh: 她在網路上更新了她的個人資料。

profound.en: The book had a profound effect on me.
profound.zh: 這本書對我有深遠的影響。

progressive.en: The school has progressive teaching methods.
progressive.zh: 這所學校有進步的教學方法。

projection.zh: 預測顯示銷售量會上升。

prolong.en: Good care can prolong a pet's life.
prolong.zh: 妥善的照顧能延長寵物的壽命。

prone.en: He is prone to making careless mistakes.

propaganda.en: The poster was a piece of propaganda.
propaganda.zh: 這張海報是一種宣傳品。

prophet.en: People believed the words of the prophet.

proportion.en: A large proportion of the class agreed.
proportion.zh: 班上很大一部分人同意。

prosecution.zh: 檢方提出了有力的證據。

prospect.en: The prospect of a holiday made us happy.
prospect.zh: 放假的前景讓我們很開心。

province.en: They moved to a quiet northern province.
province.zh: 他們搬到了北部一個安靜的省份。

provision.en: The contract has a special provision.
provision.zh: 這份合約有一項特別條款。

provoke.en: Don't provoke the dog with a stick.
provoke.zh: 別用棍子去激怒那隻狗。

pulse.en: The nurse checked the patient's pulse.
pulse.zh: 護士檢查了病人的脈搏。

purchase.en: She made a large purchase at the store.
purchase.zh: 她在店裡買了一大筆東西。
